p0.description: The prevalence of smoking in U.S. adults (population proportion under the null hypothesis), used as the reference value in the hypothesis test.

n.description: Sample size of individuals from the particular community.

p_hat.description: Sample proportion of smokers in the community (17/57 ≈ 0.298, though the problem states 0.208; this is the observed sample proportion used in the test statistic calculation).

SE_p.description: Standard error of the sample proportion under the null hypothesis, used in the denominator of the test statistic.
